name: AI Products
description: Workflow templates for reviewing public AI and LLM product interfaces with deterministic accessibility checks.
responsible_use: Use only public pages or pages where permission was granted.
Do not submit real personal data.
Stop before final submission/payment unless explicitly testing a local sample page.

workflows.name: Open chat interface
workflows.description: A visitor tries to reach the primary chat or prompt interface.
required_actions: Find chat or try-now entry point
Confirm focus moves into usable controls
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Send prompt
workflows.description: A user tries to type a prompt and activate the send control.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Read generated response
workflows.description: A user tries to identify when a response is loading and read the generated answer.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Change model or mode
workflows.description: A user tries to find and operate a model, mode, or tool selector.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Upload file
workflows.description: A user tries to locate a file upload control and understand upload requirements.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Copy or export response
workflows.description: A user tries to copy, download, or export a generated response.
required_actions: Activate the control with keyboard interaction
Confirm the result or status message
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Access pricing or support
workflows.description: A visitor tries to find pricing, support, or account help information.
required_actions: Identify plan, support, or help details
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.
